title: donchian_breakout param overrides
description: Validates the param_overrides map for any spec-driven strategy with archetype=donchian_breakout (DON1-style).

rvolMin.description: Minimum relative-volume multiple to qualify the breakout. 1.30 is the BTC-trend validated cut.

stopAtrMult.description: Initial stop = entry - stopAtrMult * ATR. Below 2.0 cuts tail winners on BTC trend.

useRiskBasedSizing.description: INERT post-V56 — engines read account_strategy.use_risk_based_sizing. Accepted only so legacy spec rows still validate; new writes are ignored by the engine.

riskPct.description: INERT post-V56 — engines read account_strategy.risk_pct. Set risk via the account-strategy panel, not the spec param_overrides.
